name: Hot Dog Onion Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium Onions, cut into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion slices and sauté for about 7 minutes, until golden brown and tender.
3. Mix in the ketchup.
4. Add cinnamon, chili powder, hot pepper sauce, and salt.
5. Pour in water; stir.
6. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered for about 10 minutes.
